3163120.name: Greek Kitchen Frenzy: Dionysus
3163120.description:
Step into the bustling world of Ancient Greece in "Greek Kitchen Frenzy: Dionysus," a thrilling time management game where your culinary skills and quick thinking will determine the fate of humanity. 

Join Irakli, the humble tavern keeper, on an epic mission to save his people from the wrath of Dionysus, the god of winemaking and revelry. With the citizens of Hellas neglecting the simple joys of food and festivity, Dionysus threatens to unleash his fury. Pleading for one last chance, Irakli vows to transform his modest tavern into the legendary "Dionysus Tavern."

Team up with Pasithea, Dionysus's daughter, and create mouth-watering dishes to attract a diverse cast of patrons, from mythical creatures to gods. Enjoy humorous interactions, enchanting music, and an evolving tavern environment. Delight your customers, earn their praise, and upgrade your tavern to new heights. 

Can you help Irakli fulfill his promise and showcase humanity's enduring devotion to the gods? Dive into "Greek Kitchen Frenzy: Dionysus" and find out!

  • Save humanity from divine wrath through delicious creativity!

  • Experience dynamic gameplay with strategic time management!

  • Feed mythical creatures, heroes and even the gods!

  • Expand your culinary expertise with each level and challenge!

  • Transform your tavern into a legendary hotspot revered by all!

  • Meet Hercules, Megara, Dionysus, Hera and many more characters!
3163120.supported_languages: 英语, 法语, 意大利语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 荷兰语, 葡萄牙语 - 葡萄牙, 俄语
